title: parallax unified daemon — machine-readable invocation declaration
_doc: The PARSEABLE invocation declaration: a consumer's adapter-builder reads THIS to invoke the daemon deterministically — no prose-reading, no --help parsing, no behavioural probing, no model tokens spent inferring conventions. The canonical schema for this declaration; supersedes the prose-shaped seed. Not a JSON-Schema (it validates nothing) — it is a declaration; the one DATA artifact (detect_result) names its own validating schema.

flags.--advance: fill reviewed from the manifest + advance the pin in-tree
flags.--all: combined ledger-entry stub across ALL partners with a current per-partner draft (positional form 'prepare all' also accepted) — the interleaved 'detect A; detect B -> one combined reaction' cadence; with --advance, advances every drafted partner's pin. Scans the per-partner draft scratch files.

relay.refuses_if: a relayed path is dirty/untracked (per-path, not whole-tree)

ledger.emits: read-only JSON summary of the last N ledger entries {total_entries, shown, entries:[{date,partner,head,msg,reviewed,obligations}]}; no mutation, no pin advance, no schema change

exit.0: success (partner HEAD passed the pin; inbox written)

watch.blocks_until: the partner HEAD passes the pin (reflog-driven; --poll falls back to polling where no file-watcher exists)
watch.then: runs detect (+ prepare on obligation), writes inbox, exits 0 — NEVER commits or relays

index-diff.emits: {added, removed, changed} claim ids vs the last-pinned claims_index.json (warns + diffs against empty if the pin is unreachable)
index-diff.appends: manifest (each partner read is I8-logged, like read)

div-diff.emits: {only_ours, only_theirs, disagree, aging_mismatch} over recent + archived divergences (aging-robust)
div-diff.appends: manifest (each partner read is I8-logged, like read)

age-divergences.emits: local housekeeping — archive resolved/open divergences past the aging thresholds into divergences.archived.*.json; NO partner read

exit_codes.2: usage / argument error (unknown command, missing arg, missing/corrupt config)

detect_result.legacy_mirror: _detect.json (last-run single-slot mirror; in multi-partner flows read the per-partner file, NOT this — the mirror carries only the most recent detect)

effects.per_partner_scratch: detect_result / entry_draft / inbox are keyed by partner ({partner} in the name); each also writes a single-slot LEGACY mirror (_detect.json / _sync_entry_draft.json / _inbox.json) carrying only the last run — read the per-partner file in multi-partner flows to avoid cross-partner contamination
effects.draft_semantics: to_review filled at detect (classified); reviewed filled at prepare (actually-read, from the manifest) — 2a

guard.mechanism: PreToolUse hook — the daemon invoked with --read-guard reads a tool-call event as JSON on stdin and gates partner-repo access
guard.rationale: a hook blocks unconditionally (exit 2 denies the tool call); the sync-flag file is the sanctioned-access escape hatch

adapter_build: A consumer reads subcommands.argv + detect_result.file + effects + exit_codes + guard.invoke to build an adapter mechanically (see conformance/_adapter.from_interface_declaration). No --help parsing, no behavioural probing required to invoke.
